chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 373 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on withdrawal statement dt. 28.06.2024 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1540/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case. 13.03.2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General >>>>>..<<<<< Petitioner has filed withdrawal statement dated 28.06.2024 along with supporting affidavit, which reflects that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
